overall.description: A slow cinematic journey through a misty fjord between towering dark rock cliffs. The atmosphere is moody and desaturated with low visibility, characteristic of high-end game engine footage. The camera moves smoothly forward over calm reflective water as the landscape gradually opens to reveal distant mist-shrouded mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow fjord passage between steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: moving slowly forward through the narrow waterway between high cliff walls on both sides

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall rising vertically from the water
tall rocky cliff face with rough texture
mirror-like water reflecting the gray sky and cliffs
overcast gray sky visible between the cliff tops
sparse dark vegetation visible on the upper edge of the left cliff

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed fjord passage with steep dark cliffs rising immediately on both sides. The water is perfectly calm and reflective. Sparse trees are visible atop the left cliff. The atmosphere is heavy with fog, limiting visibility to the immediate surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening fjord with emerging distant mountain views

events.description: the narrow canyon opens up revealing distant misty mountains on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the waterway gradually widens and distant landforms emerge from the fog

entered.detail: faint silhouettes of mountains visible through the mist in the distance

segments.scene_description: As the vessel moves forward, the narrow passage widens into a broader channel. The left cliff face recedes into the distance while the right cliff remains prominent. Distant mountain silhouettes emerge from the fog on the horizon, creating a sense of vastness beyond the immediate channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open misty fjord with distant mountain silhouettes

events.description: the left cliff fades from view as the open water expands, revealing more of the distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: moving through open water with the right cliff face prominent and expansive misty mountains ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide fjord with the left cliff now vanished into the distance. The right cliff face dominates the right side of the frame in greater detail. The distant mountain range stretches across the horizon, partially obscured by shifting fog, while the water remains glassy and reflective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic fjord passage that gradually expands into a vast, open waterway. It begins within a narrow corridor of steep dark cliffs and heavy fog, gliding over perfectly calm, reflective water. As the camera advances, the passage widens into a broader channel, causing the left cliff face to recede while distant mountain silhouettes begin to emerge from the mist on the horizon. The scene then opens fully into a wide fjord where the left cliff vanishes entirely, leaving the detailed right cliff to dominate the frame. Finally, the view stretches across a glassy expanse of water toward a sprawling mountain range partially obscured by shifting fog.
